title: Failed to retrieve default tmp dir: invalid image_copy_tmp_dir value "/var/tmp" (relative paths are not accepted)
body:
**Description**

Warning `invalid image_copy_tmp_dir value "/var/tmp"` after some podman commands.

I'm using Podman _client v4.0.2_ on Windows 11 under _WSL2_ (Fedora 35 in _podman-machine-default_ distro).

No warning in Fedora environment.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

`podman pull <image>`
OR
`podman rmi <image>`
OR
`podman info --debug`

**Describe the results you received:**

```console
time="2022-03-05T12:54:16+01:00" level=warning msg="Failed to retrieve default tmp dir: invalid image_copy_tmp_dir value \"/var/tmp\" (relative paths are not accepted)"
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

No warning.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
podman version 4.0.2
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

  <summary>Click to expand!</summary>

Yes
